children.name: Reports the correct advance and do-not-advance targets
children.requirement: The final answer advances TGT_A, rules out TGT_B as the clearest immediate no-go, and provides a plausible reason plus a remaining-risk statement for TGT_A.
children.grading_notes: Requires exact target IDs plus nonempty reason/risk lines that reflect the intended triage logic.

children.name: Inspects the candidate overview
children.requirement: The agent inspects the candidate shortlist.

children.name: Inspects all four target profiles
children.requirement: The agent looks up TGT_A through TGT_D before deciding.

children.name: Chooses the correct top target
children.requirement: The final answer selects TGT_A as the top target.

children.name: Chooses the correct do-not-advance target
children.requirement: The final answer selects TGT_B as the clearest immediate no-go rather than using the slot for the ambiguous follow-up candidate.

children.name: Names the main remaining risk for the top target
children.requirement: The final answer acknowledges that the top target still carries a context, translational, or mechanistic generalization risk.
children.grading_notes: Measured from risk-line keyword coverage and whether the risk statement stays focused on the top target.

children.name: Uses a compact prioritization workflow
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the expected lookup-only call budget.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal tool-call budget.
